title: Potential effects on the operation of the UK Internal Market from proposed regulatory differences relating to bovine electronic identification
body: "This report sets out the OIM’s findings as part of a review of regulatory differences arising from proposed legislation relating to bovine electronic identification under section 33(1) of the UK Internal Market Act 2020 relevant to assessing or promoting the effective operation of the internal market in the UK.  For more information, visit the Study into proposed regulatory changes to bovine electronic identification in the United Kingdom "
